title: Polylex Manifest
description: Contract between a Polylex deploy (writer) and a Polylex SDK runtime (reader). The manifest tells the SDK which version of translations is currently live and where to fetch the per-locale bundles. See https://github.com/Polylex/polylex-sdk for the full architecture.

$schema.description: Optional self-reference to this JSON Schema. Lets editors auto-validate hand-written manifests. Polylex's deploy step writes this automatically; hand-authored manifests can include it or omit it.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. Bumped only on breaking changes to the manifest contract itself.

version.description: Identifier for this release. SDKs compare against the cached value to decide whether to re-fetch. Format is customer-defined — typical choices are an ISO 8601 timestamp (e.g., '2026-04-28T10-30-00Z'), a commit SHA, or a semver string. Must be filesystem-safe if used as a path segment.

translations_base_url.description: Base URL the SDK appends '/messages_<locale>.json' to when fetching a translation bundle. Typically ends with '<base>/<version>/translations'. Must be HTTPS in production; HTTP is only valid for local-dev fixtures.

items.description: BCP 47 locale tag, lowercased base language. Examples: 'en', 'hi', 'pt-BR', 'zh-Hans-CN'.

locales.description: Locales available in this release. Informational; the SDK may request a locale not in this list and rely on the CDN 404 + fallback chain. Empty array is allowed (rare but valid).

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this manifest was written. Informational; the SDK does not depend on it.

source_commit.description: Commit SHA of the source code that produced this release. Informational; useful for debugging which build wrote a given manifest.
